name: The Drider
description:
You wander deep into the woods and stumble upon a cave when it suddenly starts raining. Not wanting to get wet, you enter the cave to keep dry, not knowing you just walked right into the Drider’s territory.
-----------------------------------
Nsfw contents: monsterfucking, eggpreg, bondage, venom/aphrodisiacs, human incubator

Part of my Monsterwoman Halloween Series!

join >[my bot hub server](https://discord.gg/GjzqkDdjX9) for bot updates!

**If you see a copy of this bot in any other site that is not J.ai, please report it and DM me.**

**Preparation and suggested settings to chat with this bot with LLM:**
- **Temperature settings**: 0.65 - 0.85 *do not go above 0.85 as it may begin spouting nonsense and forgetting prompting*
- **Max new token settings**: 300 - 800 *going over 800 will make the bot start speaking for you more often*
- Use jailbreaks/advanced prompts to prevent problems such as misgendering, wrong pronouns, etc
- Use chat memory to reiterate certain information about user
